title: Brand Signup
description: How to create a Bloom account as a hardware brand. Covers the signup form, company details, and account verification.

title: Submitting a Service Request
description: Walk through the AI-powered service request chat. Describe what you need, provide product details, and get your request summarized into a structured RFP.

title: Brand Dashboard & Portal
description: Tour of the brand dashboard: projects, requests, documents, invoices, company and contact pages. Everything you can do once you're logged in.

title: Provider Signup
description: How to join the Bloom network as a service provider. Covers the signup form, capability documentation, file uploads, and submitting for qualification.

title: Ops Dashboard & Workflow
description: How the Bloom operations team manages the network: company accounts, projects, conversations, onboarding requests, and notifications.
